title: platanus occidentalis var. glabrata
intro: Platanus occidentalis var. glabrata, also known as American Sycamore, is a variety of the American Sycamore tree (Platanus occidentalis), which is native to eastern North America. The bark and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Platanus occidentalis var. glabrata include treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots are often made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
